1
To submit new or missing information, or if you have further suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out via Discord or Leaked.cx (@WRLDOverlord). Your input is valuable in improving the Tracker, thank you for your contribution. Join The Uzi Tracker Discord Server → discord.gg/spreadsheet

3
PLEASE BE ADVISED THE TRACKER IS CONSTANTLY UNDER DEVELOPMENT AND CHANGING. I RECOMMEND ZOOMING OUT YOUR WEB PAGE TO 75% FOR EASIER VISIBILITY, AND SEARCHING FOR SONGS USING THE COMMANDS: ‘⌘+F’ (MacOs) OR ‘CTRL + F’ (Windows).

TPLT1Bad and Boujee (feat. Lil Uzi Vert) [v1]OffsetG Koop & Metro BoominKesha Lee-N/AN/AMeans Street Recording Studio, Marietta Street Artery, Atlanta, GA.--Original Demo Track
(Unsurfaced)
[Completed]
85
TPLT2CAN U BE (with Travis Scott & Lil Uzi Vert)
Pressure		Lil Uzi Vert, Marvin Gaye, Kanye West & Travis Scott Che Pope, Havoc & Kanye WestKanye West, Mike Dean, Kesha Lee & UnknownOne of the tracks rumored from Kanye West's scrapped project, "TurboGrafx" era. Track was intended to feature Lil Uzi Vert and was sent as an open verse demo for them to fill. According to leak sources, it's unknown if Lil Uzi Vert filled and submitted back a verse for this track. An alternate version of the track, including Travis Scott has surfaced, including Lil Uzi Vert in the file name. Track samples Diana Ross & Marvin Gaye's 'Stop, Look, Listen (To Your Heart)' and Henry Purcell's 'Music For The Funeral Of Queen Mary - March'. The track's intro is sampled from the 2012 film, 'Silver Linings Playbook'.File Name: trav uzi pressure bLny6p
Session Title (1): trav uzi pressure
Session Title (2): Pressure Stems 111 BPM		N/A---Throwaway Track
(N/A; Unsurfaced)

LIR25Another WinterLil Uzi VertGLOhanUnknownTrack contains a sample from the video game, Scott Pilgrim vs. The World™: The Game. On November 5, 2016, Lil Uzi Vert would respond to GLOhan about using this instrumental. Instrumental was one of the four sent by GLOhan Beats that Lil Uzi Vert emailed a response back to GLOhan, and most likely recorded on. All of this information was revealed during an interview between GLOhan and Youtuber, Nick Robinson.N/AFIle Name (1): Another Winter (Prod. By GLOhan Beats)
FIle Name (2): Another Winter ('16)		-Recorded
November [?], 2016.		-Throwaway Track
(N/A; Unsurfaced)

LIR252New WaveLil Uzi VertGLOhanUnknownTrack contains numerous samples from the video game Super Monkey Ball 2, most notably the third world in the game, 'Under The Ocean'. On November 4, 2016, Lil Uzi Vert would respond to GLOhan about this instrumental by saying, "I'm using this amazing save this for me". Instrumental was one of the four sent by GLOhan Beats that Lil Uzi Vert emailed a response back to GLOhan, and most likely recorded on. All of this information was revealed during an interview between GLOhan and Youtuber, Nick Robinson.N/ANew Wave (Prod. B...-Recorded
November [?], 2016.		-Throwaway Track
(N/A; Unsurfaced)

LIR275That FlowLil Uzi VertGLOhanUnknownTrack contains a sample from the video game Super Monkey Ball 2. All of this information was revealed during an interview between GLOhan and Youtuber, Nick Robinson.N/AThat Flow 160bpm...-Recorded

EA41Leanin' (feat. Lil Uzi Vert)Lil PeepIIVI, Smokeasac & fish narcDylan Cooper, Lil Peep & UnknownOne of the tracks put up for album consideration for Lil Peep's "Come Over When You're Sober, Pt. 2". The track was shown as a scrapped feature as Lil Peep's mother disliked the idea due to the backlash with other posthumous features. The original Track was recorded by Lil Peep, and was engineered himself using GarageBand, and was exported with the title, 'My Song 11'. It is unknown if any version of this Track exists.N/Asmokeasac lil peep album beat 2-Peep's Vocals

EA 211Blow Da Whistle (v2)
McWhistle | They Still Cry		Lil Uzi VertLyle LeDuff, R.L. Beats & StarbornUnknownOriginally was intended to released on Streaming Platforms as Track #16 (Bonus) on 'Eternal Atake 2', however was scrapped for unknown reasons.Track was originally titled 'Blow Da Whistle'. Track samples McDonalds's register sounds and jingle, 'I'm Lovin' It'. Instrumental loop was first previewed on TikTok by R.L Beats on July 14, 2023.N/ALoop: grimace licked my rimous-Recorded

914
EA 213Chill EbroLil Uzi VertokArgenis "Trilla" Peguero & Cashmere CatOriginally was intended to released on Streaming Platforms as Track #16 on 'Eternal Atake 2', however was scrapped for unknown reasons. Presumed from the Track's contents, this is a diss to Ebro Darden, co-host of the Host 97 morning show, 'Ebro in the Morning'. Track was originally teased via Instagram Story by Lil Uzi Vert, showing a covered Eternal Atake 2 tracklist. From this original teaser, this was the only legible Track title.N/AN/AJungle City Recording Studio, Manhattan, New York City, NY.-First Previewed
November 19, 2024.
First Teased
